rationale: Uses the same corpus 'Senior/Staff' bucket as L5 (3 points: Adyen $184K-$276K, GitLab Sr Mgr PS Tech Architect $171K-$289K, Broadcom $100K-$160K) — the GitLab and Adyen upper bounds ($276K-$289K) plausibly represent the Staff end of this blended bucket. File's Staff base p50 ($225K) falls within the range. Raising low→medium, but flagging that L5 and Staff share the exact same 3 underlying corpus points (the bucket doesn't cleanly separate the two levels), so this is weaker support than a level-clean anchor.
